post_text: Our fund guarantees 15% annual returns every year. Past performance shows we have never lost money. Invest now before this opportunity closes.
notes: Performance guarantee + projection — two critical violations

post_text: Join our exclusive investment opportunity. Limited spots available. Our members always win and never experience losses.
notes: Misleading claims, no specific guarantee — likely medium risk

post_text: Based on our track record, we predict the market will rise 20% next quarter. Our analysts guarantee this forecast is accurate.
